**Describe the bug**
A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

**Where**
- Platform: <!-- e.g. claude.ai, chatgpt.com -->
- Browser + version: <!-- e.g. Chrome 126 -->
- Extension version: <!-- see chrome://extensions -->

**To reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Type/click '...'
3. See error

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / console output**
If applicable, add screenshots or paste any errors from the DevTools console.
